caption: Figure 5.1. Operating Cost Structure by the Three Departments of A Company
description: A 3D pie chart illustrating the operating cost distribution among three departments: Cutting raw woods, Fabrication, and Transportation.

caption: Figure 5.2. Operating Cost Structure by the Cost Items of a Company
description: A 3D pie chart showing the breakdown of operating costs by specific items: Raw woods, Electricity, Diesel oil, Labour, Depreciation, and Interest payment.
